description: Composition Black shorts with blue stripes, made of 100% cotton, has belt loops on the waistband, a button and zipper closure and internal drawcord, two insert pockets on the sides, two pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, and two cargo style pockets with buttoned flaps on the lower sides, branding patch on the back right pocket Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Line dry or tumble dry immediately after washing Cool iron Get ready for the outdoors with these walking shorts from quiksilver. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day while the big practical pockets add style appeal. Team this with a bright tee and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with your pals. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
